content.en:
"This is it!"

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord said.

At this moment, in front of Ye Tian was a distorted time and space, and on the way to their arrival, they also passed through one forbidden place after another, it can be said that just by coming here, they couldn't do it without the strength of the perfect controller.

The point is, it's very remote, so the chances of spotting it are low.

Soon, Ye Tian and the Stone Dragon Demon Lord passed through a distorted land and came to a strange territory, and here there was a magnificent palace and a dense magic circle.

"Stone Dragon Demon Lord, these magic circles are arranged by you!"

Ye Tian said.

"That's good!" the Stone Dragon Demon Lord nodded, "I also set up the formation and palace to prevent a perfect controller from entering this place by mistake, so that people will think that this is a strong man's retreat, so he will retreat and will not continue to explore." "

Then, they continued to move on, passing through the area, and only then did they see a crack that was not too big.

And this crack turned out to be somewhat similar to the entrance of the Extreme Dao Source Sea in Extreme Dao Mountain.

"Infinite Master, this leads to an unknown area, and I have found some good things in it, among which is the treasure that transforms my perfect ancestral endowment. If you want to get in, go inside. Of course, if it falls inside, don't blame me!" said the Stone Dragon Demon Lord with a smile.

"Then don't bother the Stone Dragon Demon Lord to worry!"

Ye Tian said.

Immediately, Ye Tian's body moved, and he directly entered this crack.

"Hehe, it's just looking for death, even those who have a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Realm dare to go in, and they are doomed!"

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord muttered.

Although even if Ye Tian fell, it was only a clone that fell, and it was just a small loss.

But once Ye Tian saw the good things there, maybe he would go crazy, and the number of fallen clones was enough to make him feel distressed.

However, in the future, Ye Tianzhen will break through to the realm of the perfect controller, and maybe he will soon be able to grow to the realm of the super perfect controller, and then he will be able to hope to get some good things.

"Wait until then, and then work with him, maybe I can get some benefits again!"

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord said secretly.

In short, it was a pity to expose this place, but he had a handle in Ye Tian's hands, so he could only reveal it.

What's more, he currently has no hope of breaking through to the perfect controller of the Void Realm, and he also hopes to cooperate with Ye Tian in the future, so as to obtain the treasure that allows him to break through in that mysterious place, but now Ye Tian is not qualified to cooperate with him.

"It's a pity that my strength is insufficient, otherwise even if I risk offending the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm, I won't reveal this place!"

He vaguely felt that there was a great opportunity here, but he couldn't go deeper.

And a treasure that cannot be penetrated into is worthless.

This is also the reason why he revealed it to Ye Tian.

......

"Here ......"

Ye Tian frowned, because the aura and rule environment here were too similar to the Extreme Dao Source Sea, but it seemed to be more advanced than the Extreme Dao Source Sea.

Moreover, the suppression here is very powerful, and even an ordinary perfect controller will be suppressed to the point where it is difficult to exert too much strength.

"This can't be the Extreme Deep Sea, right?"

Ye Tian guessed.

If it is really the Extreme Deep Sea, isn't this crack a shortcut to smuggling into the Extreme Deep Sea?

In the Extreme Dao Source Sea, those Extreme Dao creatures whose strength is comparable to that of the super-level perfect controller cannot enter the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, and there is hope for endless years to wait for a place, and for a place, they are all competing wildly.

This shows how eager they are to enter the deep sea!

"Maybe it's the Extreme Deep Sea, maybe it's not!"

Ye Tian didn't dare to be sure, and he didn't think about it.

But there is no doubt that this place should be very dangerous.

"The Stone Dragon Demon Lord may think that if I enter here, I will fall soon!" Ye Tian said with a smile.

Of course, the area that just came in shouldn't be dangerous, and even if it was dangerous before, it should have been cleaned up by the Stone Dragon Demon Lord.

But once out of this area, it's a real danger.

Wow!

Ye Tian began to shuttle around this area.

The appearance of this place is a black earth, and the earth also faintly exudes a trace of the breath of the Extreme Dao, this breath is very weak, if you comprehend the Extreme Dao, otherwise you can't perceive it at all.

Along the way, Ye Tian sensed some traces of battle, which had not dissipated after countless years, and it was very likely that they were traces of the battle between the Stone Dragon Demon Lord and the enemy.

However, the things left here are almost worthless, and the good things must have been taken away by the Stone Dragon Demon Lord, and nothing good will be left.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to clear up this area, this should be an unimaginably large island.

And there are traces of battles everywhere on this island, which shows that the stone dragon demon lord has definitely explored here for countless years, and he must not know how many times he has fallen, so he has killed all the creatures on this island and robbed all the treasures.

And beyond this island, there is a black endless ocean.

Now.

Ye Tian sensed the existence of the crisis from this endless black sea.

Obviously, there is danger here.

Ye Tian stepped into this Black Sea in one step, and the terrifying pressure struck, which was even greater than the pressure on the island, and the breath of the Black Sea was mixed with a violent extreme aura.

If an ordinary half-step perfect controller entered here, the physical body would be directly shattered.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian continued to move forward and shuttle, and suddenly a crisis came, and a very powerful Extreme Dao creature appeared.

However, to Ye Tian's surprise, this Extreme Dao creature was obviously comparable to a high-level perfect controller, but its aura was tyrannical, as if it had no wisdom.

"Extreme Prison!"

Ye Tian used this Extreme Dao Control Technique and instantly captured this Extreme Dao creature.

Immediately, he studied it, but found nothing, this extreme creature seemed to be a beast without intelligence, but its strength had reached the realm of a high-level perfect controller.

"Die!"

Ye Tian killed this high-level perfect master.

With his current strength, he was comparable to the weaker Super Perfection Controller, and the Advanced Perfection Controller had no power to resist in his hands at all.

Next, Ye Tian encountered several more Extreme Dao creatures, all of which were also very tyrannical, completely different from the Extreme Dao creatures in the Extreme Dao Source Sea.

The Extreme Dao creatures in the Extreme Dao Source Sea are at least intelligent and can communicate, while the Extreme Dao creatures here are completely unable to communicate.

However, these Extreme Dao creatures all have perfect-level ancestral endowments, but Ye Tian currently has no shortage of perfect-level ancestral endowments, but if they encounter it, they will copy it.

this day.

Ye Tian finally encountered a very terrifying Extreme Dao creature, and the strength of the other party reached the level of a super-perfect controller.
